name: Morisyen

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Morisyen (mori1278).

notes: Skeleton. French-lexifier creole of Mauritius written in a Latin, largely phonemic orthography. Grapheme map follows the modern conventions: ou [u], ch [ʃ], j [ʒ], z [z], the nasal-vowel digraphs an [ã], on [õ], in [ẽ], and gn [ɲ]. Standardisation of the spelling is recent and older French-etymology spellings still circulate; the phonetic value of contextual variation is not fully recoverable and any prosody is left unencoded, so a PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Morisyen (mori1278)
